Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** *p adic numbers *)

(** By Alvaro Pelayo, Vladimir Voevodsky and Michael A. Warren *)

(** 2012 *)

(** made compatible with the current UniMath library by Ralph Matthes in October 2017 *)

(** Imports *)

Require Import UniMath.PAdics.lemmas.
Require Import UniMath.PAdics.fps.
Require Import UniMath.PAdics.frac.
Require Import UniMath.PAdics.z_mod_p.


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Unset Kernel Term Sharing. (** crucial for timely proof-checking, otherwise unbearable *)

(** * I. Several basic lemmas *)

Local Open Scope hz_scope.


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 0 a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 0
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 (S upper) a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 0 a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 0
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
 
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) =
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) =
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)

    apply idpath.
    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 (S upper) a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
 
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper a + a (S upper)) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper)))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper)))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m

upper: nat
IHupper: hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =

hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x
     (natsummation0 upper
        (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n))) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper)))

x: hzneq 0 m

upper: nat

hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)) +

     (hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))))

m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzremaindermod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) =

     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper)))

      apply idpath.
Defined.


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 0 a) =
natsummation0 0 (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 0
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 (S upper) a) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 0 a) =
natsummation0 0 (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 0
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
 
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) + 0

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat)

    apply idpath.
  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 (S upper) a) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
 
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper a + a (S upper)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) +
hzquotientmod m x (a (S upper)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =

  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n))) +
hzquotientmod m x (a (S upper)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper

natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
(hzquotientmod m x
   (natsummation0 upper
      (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n))) +
 hzquotientmod m x (a (S upper))) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (natsummation0 upper a) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

a: nat → hz
upper: nat

  (natsummation0 upper

natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
(hzquotientmod m x (a (S upper)) +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (natsummation0 upper
      (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))) +
hzquotientmod m x

hzquotientmod m x

     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =

  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
(hzquotientmod m x
   (natsummation0 upper
      (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n))) +
 (hzquotientmod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) +
  hzquotientmod m x
    (hzremaindermod m x
       (natsummation0 upper
          (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n))) +
     hzremaindermod m x
       (hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper)))))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
(hzquotientmod m x
   (natsummation0 upper
      (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n))) +
 hzquotientmod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x
      (natsummation0 upper
         (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n))) +
    hzremaindermod m x
      (hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a: nat → hz
upper: nat
IHupper: hzquotientmod m x (natsummation0 upper a) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)) +
   hzremaindermod m x (a (S upper))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a n)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m x (a n)))

    apply idpath.
Defined.


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x (a * b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x (a * b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x (a * b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
hzremaindermod m x b * hzquotientmod m x a +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b * m +
hzquotientmod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a * (hzquotientmod m x b * m) +
hzquotientmod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

  
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a *
(hzquotientmod m x b * m + hzremaindermod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a *
(m * hzquotientmod m x b + hzremaindermod m x b) +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) =
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a * b +

hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b) =

hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: hz
hzquotientmod m x a * b +
(hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b)) =

(hzremaindermod m x a * hzquotientmod m x b +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x a * hzremaindermod m x b))

Defined.


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (fpstimes hz a b upper) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (upper - i)%nat))


m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (fpstimes hz a b upper) =
natsummation0 upper
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 upper
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (upper - i)%nat))

x: hzneq 0 m

upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (fpstimes hz a b upper) =

  (λ i : nat,

hzquotientmod m x

     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (upper - i)%nat))

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (fpstimes hz a b 0%nat) =
natsummation0 0
  (λ i : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (0 - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 0
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (0 - i)%nat))

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (fpstimes hz a b (S upper)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat))

  (λ i : nat, hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (0 - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x

     (λ i : nat,

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (fpstimes hz a b 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat)

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 0
     (λ x : nat, (a x * b (0 - x)%nat)%ring)) =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat)

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat * b 0%nat)%ring =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat)

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat)) =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat)

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
(hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
 hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
    hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat))) =
hzquotientmod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat)

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat)) =
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat)

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat)) =
hzquotientmod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) * m +
hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat)) =
0 * hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) * m +
hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat) * 0 +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat)) =
0 * hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) * m + 0 +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat)) =
0 + 0 +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat))

x: hzneq 0 m

hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat)) =

hzquotientmod m x (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat))

  (hzremaindermod m x (a 0%nat) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b 0%nat))

    apply idpath.

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
hzquotientmod m x (fpstimes hz a b (S upper)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat))

a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat

  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ x : nat, (a x * b (S upper - x)%nat)%ring)) =

  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ i : nat,

a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat

  (λ n : nat,

hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +

  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x
        (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat))

  (hzremaindermod m x (a k) *

  (hzremaindermod m x (a k) *

m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x
        (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a x0) * b (S upper - x0)%nat +
   hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
   hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat) +
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
      hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x
        (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
(natsummation0 (S upper)
   (λ x0 : nat,
    (hzquotientmod m x (a x0) * b (S upper - x0)%nat +
     hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
     hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))%hz) +
 natsummation0 (S upper)
   (λ x0 : nat,
    hzquotientmod m x
      (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
       hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))%hz))%ring +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x
        (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ i : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ i : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a i) * b (S upper - i)%nat))

x: hzneq 0 m

upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,

hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +

  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
∏ x0 : nat,
x0 ≤ S upper
→ hzremaindermod m x

  hzremaindermod m x (a x0 * b (S upper - x0)%nat)

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m

upper: nat

j: nat
p: j ≤ S upper
hzremaindermod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a j) * b (S upper - j)%nat) =
hzremaindermod m x (a j * b (S upper - j)%nat)

   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
      hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat))
 
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   ((hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
     hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))%hz +
    hzquotientmod m x
      (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
       hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))%hz)%ring) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
∏ x0 : nat,
x0 ≤ S upper
→ ((hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
    hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))%hz +
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
      hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))%hz)%ring =
  hzquotientmod m x
    (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) * b (S upper - x0)%nat)

x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))

  (λ n : nat,

natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,

p: j ≤ S upper
((hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
  hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *

hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a j) * b (S upper - j)%nat)

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
j: nat
p: j ≤ S upper
((hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
  hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
    hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz)%ring =
hzquotientmod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) * m +
hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) *
hzquotientmod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
j: nat
p: j ≤ S upper
((hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
  hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
    hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz)%ring =
0 * hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) * m +
hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) * 0 +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
j: nat
p: j ≤ S upper
((hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
  hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
    hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz)%ring =
0 + hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) * 0 +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
j: nat
p: j ≤ S upper
((hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
  hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
    hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz)%ring =
0 + 0 +
hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (hzremaindermod m x (a j)) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,

hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))

  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =

  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))

p: j ≤ S upper
((hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
  hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
    hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz)%ring =

   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))

      
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
j: nat
p: j ≤ S upper
((hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
  hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz +
 hzquotientmod m x
   (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
    hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))%hz)%ring =
hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat) +

  (hzremaindermod m x (a j) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - j)%nat))

m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
h: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
   hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat)) +
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
      hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
   hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat)) +
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
      hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x
        (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)))

    
m: hz
x: hzneq 0 m
a, b: nat → hz
upper: nat
f: ∏ n : nat,
hzquotientmod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat) =
hzquotientmod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat +
hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
   hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - n)%nat))
g: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat))
h: natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
   hzquotientmod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat)) +
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a x0) *
      hzremaindermod m x (b (S upper - x0)%nat))) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) *
      b (S upper - n)%nat))
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x
        (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)%ring)) =
natsummation0 (S upper)
  (λ n : nat,
   hzquotientmod m x
     (hzremaindermod m x (a n) * b (S upper - n)%nat)) +
hzquotientmod m x
  (natsummation0 (S upper)
     (λ n : nat,
      hzremaindermod m x (a n * b (S upper - n)%nat)))

    apply idpath.
Defined.

Close Scope hz_scope.

(** * II. The carrying operation and induced equivalence relation on
formal power series *)

(** A lemma that does not depend on a non-zero integer and that used to
    appear where needed below - the point has been marked by a comment. *)

Local Open Scope ring_scope.


R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 (S upper) f + natsummation0 upper g =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 upper (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)


R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 (S upper) f + natsummation0 upper g =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 upper (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)

  
R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 (S upper) f + natsummation0 upper g =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 upper (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)

  
R: commring
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 1 f + natsummation0 0 g =
f 0%nat + natsummation0 0 (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)
R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 (S (S upper)) f +
natsummation0 (S upper) g =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)

  
R: commring
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 1 f + natsummation0 0 g =
f 0%nat + natsummation0 0 (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)
 
R: commring
f, g: nat → R
nat_rect (λ _ : nat, (nat → R) → R)
  (λ f : nat → R, f 0%nat)
  (λ (upper : nat) (IHupper : (nat → R) → R)
   (f : nat → R), IHupper f + f (S upper)) 1 f +
nat_rect (λ _ : nat, (nat → R) → R)
  (λ f : nat → R, f 0%nat)
  (λ (upper : nat) (IHupper : (nat → R) → R)
   (f : nat → R), IHupper f + f (S upper)) 0 g =
f 0%nat +
nat_rect (λ _ : nat, (nat → R) → R)
  (λ f : nat → R, f 0%nat)
  (λ (upper : nat) (IHupper : (nat → R) → R)
   (f : nat → R), IHupper f + f (S upper)) 0
  (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)

    
R: commring
f, g: nat → R
f 0%nat + f 1%nat + g 0%nat =
f 0%nat + (f 1%nat + g 0%nat)

    apply ( ringassoc1 R ).
  
R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 (S (S upper)) f +
natsummation0 (S upper) g =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)
 
R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x)) + f 0%nat +
natsummation0 (S upper) g =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)

    
R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
f 0%nat + natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x)) +
natsummation0 (S upper) g =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)

    
R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
f 0%nat +
(natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x)) +
 natsummation0 (S upper) g) =
f 0%nat +
natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x) + g x)

    
R: commring
upper: nat
f, g: nat → R
f 0%nat +
(natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x)) +
 natsummation0 (S upper) g) =
f 0%nat +
(natsummation0 (S upper) (λ x : nat, f (S x)) +
 natsummation0 (S upper) g)

    apply idpath.
Defined.

Close Scope hz_scope.

Section carry.

Local Open Scope ring_scope.

Variable m : hz.
Variable is : hzneq 0 m.

Fixpoint precarry ( a : fpscommring hz ) ( n : nat ) : hz :=
  match n with
  | 0%nat => a 0%nat
  | S n => a ( S n ) + hzquotientmod m is ( precarry a n )
  end.

Definition carry : fpscommring hz -> fpscommring hz :=
  fun (a : fpscommring hz) (n : nat) =>
    hzremaindermod m is ( precarry a n ).

(* precarry and carry are as described in the following example:

CASE: mod 3

First we normalize the sequence as we go along:

  5 6 8 4 (13) 2 2 ( remainder 2 mod 3 = 2 ) 4 1 ( remainder 13 mod 3
               = 1, quotient 13 mod 3 = 4 ) 2 2 ( remainder 8 mod 3 =
               2, quotient 8 mod 3 = 2 ) 3 1 ( remainder 10 mod 3 = 1,
               quotient 10 mod 3 = 3 ) 3 0 ( remainder 9 mod 3 = 0,
               quotient 9 mod 3 = 3 ) 2 2 ( remainder 8 mod 3 = 2,
               quotient 8 mod 3 = 2 )

2 2 0 1 2 1 2

Next we first precarry and then carry:

  5 6 8 4 (13) 2 2 4 13 2 8 3 (10) 3 9 2 8

2 8 9 (10) 8 (13) 2 <--- precarried sequence

2 2 0 1 2 1 2 <--- carried sequence *)


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
isaprop (carry a = carry b)


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
isaprop (carry a = carry b)

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
isaprop (carry a = carry b)

  apply ( fps hz ).
Defined.

Definition carryequiv0 : hrel ( fpscommring hz ) :=
  fun a b : fpscommring hz => make_hProp _ ( isapropcarryequiv a b ).


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
iseqrel carryequiv0


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
iseqrel carryequiv0

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
ispreorder carryequiv0
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
issymm carryequiv0

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
ispreorder carryequiv0
 
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
istrans carryequiv0
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
isrefl carryequiv0

    
m: hz

  make_eqrel _ carryequiviseqrel.

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: precarry (carry a) n = carry a n
carry a (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is
  ((fix precarry
      (a : fpscommring hz) (n : nat) {struct n} :
        hz :=
      match n with
      | 0%nat => a 0%nat
      | S n0 =>
          a (S n0) +
          hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n0)
      end) (carry a) n) = carry a (S n)

carry a (S n)

is: hzneq 0 m
a: fpscommring hz
n: nat

hzremaindermod m is
  (precarry
     (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m is (precarry a n))
     (S n)) = hzremaindermod m is (precarry a (S n))

      
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: carry (carry a) n = carry a n
hzremaindermod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is
     (a (S n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n)) +
   hzquotientmod m is
     (precarry
        (λ n : nat, hzremaindermod m is (precarry a n))
        n)) =
hzremaindermod m is
  (a (S n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n))

      
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: carry (carry a) n = carry a n
hzremaindermod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is
     (a (S n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n)) +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a) n)) =
hzremaindermod m is
  (a (S n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n))

      
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: carry (carry a) n = carry a n
hzremaindermod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is
     (a (S n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n)) +
   hzquotientmod m is (carry a n)) =

     (a (S n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n)) + 0) =

a: fpscommring hz

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) 0) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a 0) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b 0) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) 0)
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) (S n)) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is
  (precarry (carry a + carry b) (S n))

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) 0) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a 0) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b 0) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) 0)
 
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is ((a + b) 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m is (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m is ((carry a + carry b) 0%nat)

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat + b 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m is (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is (a 0%nat) +
   hzremaindermod m is (b 0%nat))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
(hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat) +
 hzquotientmod m is (b 0%nat) +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is (a 0%nat) +
    hzremaindermod m is (b 0%nat)))%hz =
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m is (b 0%nat) +
hzquotientmod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is (a 0%nat) +
   hzremaindermod m is (b 0%nat))

    apply idpath.
  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) (S n)) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is
  (precarry (carry a + carry b) (S n))
 
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)
hzquotientmod m is
  (a (S n) + b (S n) +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n)) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is
  (carry a (S n) + carry b (S n) +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)
hzquotientmod m is
  (a (S n) + b (S n) +
   (hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) +
    hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
    hzquotientmod m is
      (precarry (carry a + carry b) n))) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is
  (carry a (S n) + carry b (S n) +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)
hzquotientmod m is
  (a (S n) +
   (b (S n) +
    (hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) +
     hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
     hzquotientmod m is
       (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)))) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry b (S n)) +
hzquotientmod m is
  (carry a (S n) + carry b (S n) +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a + b) n) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a + carry b) n)
hzquotientmod m is
  (a (S n) +
   (b (S n) +
    (hzquotientmod m is (precarry a n) +
     hzquotientmod m is (precarry b n)) +
    hzquotientmod m is
      (precarry (carry a + carry b) n))) =
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a (S n)) +

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
f: ∏ n : nat,
carry (a + b) n = carry (carry a + carry b) n
carry (a + b) = carry (carry a + carry b)

  apply ( funextfun _ _ f ).
Defined.

Definition quotientprecarry ( a : fpscommring hz ) : fpscommring hz :=
  fun x : nat => hzquotientmod m is ( precarry a x ).


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz
hzquotientmod m is (x * y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x * y)


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz
hzquotientmod m is (x * y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x * y)

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz
hzquotientmod m is (x * y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x * y)

is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz
(hzquotientmod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y * m +
 hzremaindermod m is y * hzquotientmod m is x +
 hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y))%hz =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x * y)

x, y: hz

  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x * y)

x, y: hz

(hzquotientmod m is y * m + hzremaindermod m is y) +

  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +

x, y: hz

hzquotientmod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =

hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x * y)

x, y: hz

  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
hzquotientmod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
hzquotientmod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
(hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x) *
 hzquotientmod m is y * m +
 hzremaindermod m is y *
 hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x) +
 hzremaindermod m is (hzremaindermod m is x) *
 hzquotientmod m is y +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is (hzremaindermod m is x) *
    hzremaindermod m is y))%hz

  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
hzquotientmod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
(hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x) *
 hzquotientmod m is y * m +
 hzremaindermod m is y *
 hzquotientmod m is (hzremaindermod m is x) +
 hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y))%hz

is: hzneq 0 m
x, y: hz

hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
hzquotientmod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
(0 * hzquotientmod m is y * m +
 hzremaindermod m is y * 0 +
 hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y))%hz

x, y: hz

(0 * hzquotientmod m is y * m + 0 +
 hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y))%hz

  (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y) =
hzquotientmod m is x * y +
(0 + 0 + hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y))%hz

is: hzneq 0 m

   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y))%hz

   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y)) =

(hzremaindermod m is x * hzquotientmod m is y +
 hzquotientmod m is
   (hzremaindermod m is x * hzremaindermod m is y))

  apply idpath.
Defined.

(** here used to be shown the lemma [natsummationplusshift] *)


m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)

is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat

a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =

a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) 0) =

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) (S n)) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) 0) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) 0)

is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is ((a * b) 0%nat) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m is ((carry a * b) 0%nat)

is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat * b 0%nat) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m is ((carry a * b) 0%nat)

is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat * b 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +
hzquotientmod m is ((carry a * b) 0%nat)

  (hzremaindermod m is (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat) =
hzquotientmod m is (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat +

  (hzremaindermod m is (a 0%nat) * b 0%nat)

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) (S n)) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))
 
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
hzquotientmod m is
  ((a * b) (S n) +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n)) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
hzquotientmod m is
  ((a * b) (S n) +
   ((quotientprecarry a * b) n +
    hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n))) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
hzquotientmod m is
  ((a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
(a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n =
(precarry a * b) (S n)
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
f: (a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n =
(precarry a * b) (S n)
hzquotientmod m is
  ((a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
(a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n =
(precarry a * b) (S n)
 
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S n - x)%nat) +
(quotientprecarry a * b) n = (precarry a * b) (S n)

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
natsummation0 (S n) (λ x : nat, a x * b (S n - x)%nat) +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat, quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
(precarry a * b) (S n)

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
a 0%nat * b (S n - 0)%nat +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat +
   quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
(precarry a * b) (S n)

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
a 0%nat * b (S n - 0)%nat +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat +
   quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x : nat, precarry a x * b (S n - x)%nat)

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
a 0%nat * b (S n - 0)%nat +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat +
   quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat, precarry a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat) +
precarry a 0 * b (S n - 0)%nat

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
a 0%nat * b (S n - 0)%nat +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat +
   quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat, precarry a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat) +
a 0%nat * b (S n - 0)%nat

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
a 0%nat * b (S n) +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   a (S x) * b (n - x)%nat +
   quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   (a (S x) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a x)) *
   b (n - x)%nat) + a 0%nat * b (S n)

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
a 0%nat * b (S n) +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   a (S x) * b (n - x)%nat +
   quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
a 0%nat * b (S n) +
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   (a (S x) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a x)) *
   b (n - x)%nat)

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   a (S x) * b (n - x)%nat +
   quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 n
  (λ x : nat,
   (a (S x) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a x)) *
   b (n - x)%nat)

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
∏ x : nat,
x ≤ n
→ a (S x) * b (n - x)%nat +
  quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat =
  (a (S x) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a x)) *
  b (n - x)%nat

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
k: nat
j: k ≤ n
a (S k) * b (n - k)%nat +
quotientprecarry a k * b (n - k)%nat =
(a (S k) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a k)) *
b (n - k)%nat

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
k: nat
j: k ≤ n
a (S k) * b (n - k)%nat +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a k) * b (n - k)%nat =
(a (S k) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a k)) *
b (n - k)%nat

     
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
k: nat
j: k ≤ n
a (S k) * b (n - k)%nat +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a k) * b (n - k)%nat =
a (S k) * b (n - k)%nat +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry a k) * b (n - k)%nat

     apply idpath.
    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
f: (a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n =
(precarry a * b) (S n)
hzquotientmod m is
  ((a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

    
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
IHn: hzquotientmod m is (precarry (a * b) n) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) n + hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)
f: (a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n =
(precarry a * b) (S n)
hzquotientmod m is
  ((precarry a * b) (S n) +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) n)) =
(quotientprecarry a * b) (S n) +
hzquotientmod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

          change (a (S j) * b ( sub n j) +
                  hzquotientmod m is (precarry a j) * b ( sub n j)) with
                 (a (S j) * b ( sub n j) +
                  hzquotientmod m is (precarry a j) * b ( sub n j) )%hz.
 *)

  (a (S j) * b (n - j)%nat +
   hzquotientmod m is (precarry a j) * b (n - j)%nat)%hz

  (hzremaindermod m is
     (a (S j) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a j)) *
   hzremaindermod m is (b (n - j)%nat)) =
hzremaindermod m is (carry a (S j) * b (n - j)%nat)

is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n, j: nat
p: j ≤ n
hzremaindermod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is
     (hzremaindermod m is
        (a (S j) + hzquotientmod m is (precarry a j))) *
   hzremaindermod m is (b (n - j)%nat)) =
hzremaindermod m is (carry a (S j) * b (n - j)%nat)

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
h: hzremaindermod m is
  (natsummation0 n
     (λ x : nat,
      a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat +
      quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat)) =
hzremaindermod m is
  (natsummation0 n
     (λ x : nat, carry a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat))
hzremaindermod m is
  (a 0%nat * b (S n - 0)%nat +
   natsummation0 n
     (λ x : nat,
      a (S x) * b (S n - S x)%nat +
      quotientprecarry a x * b (n - x)%nat)) =

  (natsummation0 n

   carry a 0%nat * b (S n - 0)%nat)

m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
g: hzremaindermod m is
  ((a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n) =
hzremaindermod m is ((carry a * b) (S n))
hzremaindermod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is
     ((a * b) (S n) + (quotientprecarry a * b) n)%ring +
   hzremaindermod m is
     (hzquotientmod m is
        (precarry (carry a * b)%ring n)))%hz =
hzremaindermod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

      
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
g: hzremaindermod m is

hzremaindermod m is ((carry a * b) (S n))
hzremaindermod m is
  (hzremaindermod m is ((carry a * b)%ring (S n)) +
   hzremaindermod m is
     (hzquotientmod m is
        (precarry (carry a * b)%ring n)))%hz =
hzremaindermod m is (precarry (carry a * b) (S n))

is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
g: hzremaindermod m is

      apply idpath.
  
m: hz
is: hzneq 0 m
a, b: fpscommring hz
f: ∏ n : nat, carry (a * b) n = carry (carry a * b) n
carry (a * b) = carry (carry a * b)

  apply ( funextfun _ _ f ).
Defined.

→ carryequiv (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid

Defined.

End carry.

(** ** Some preparation for parts III/IV that does not depend on a prime number *)
(** Those used to appear where needed below, those points have been marked by comments. *)


A: commring
R: ringeqrel
a, b: A
setquotpr (pr1 R) a + setquotpr (pr1 R) b =
setquotpr (pr1 R) (a + b)


A: commring
R: ringeqrel
a, b: A
setquotpr (pr1 R) a + setquotpr (pr1 R) b =
setquotpr (pr1 R) (a + b)

  
A: commring
R: ringeqrel
a, b: A
setquotpr (pr1 R) a + setquotpr (pr1 R) b =
setquotpr (pr1 R) (a + b)

  
A: commring
R: ringeqrel
a, b: A
setquotfun2 R R op1
  (pr1
     (iscomp2binoptransrel (pr1 R)
        (eqreltrans (pr1 R)) (pr2 R)))
  (setquotpr (pr1 R) a) (setquotpr (pr1 R) b) =
setquotpr (pr1 R) (a + b)

(∏ m : nat, m < k → a m = 0%hz)
→ ∏ (b : fpscommring hz) (k' : nat),
(∏ m : nat, m < k' → b m = 0%hz) → m < k + k' → (a * b) m = 0%hz

is: ∏ m : nat, m < k → a m = 0%hz
b: fpscommring hz
k': nat
is': ∏ m : nat, m < k' → b m = 0%hz
j: S m < k + k'
g: a (S m) * b (S m - S m)%nat = 0%hz
natsummation0 m (λ x : nat, a x * b (S m - x)%nat) =
0%hz

is': ∏ m : nat, m < S k' → b m = 0%hz
j: S m < k + S k'
g: a (S m) * b (S m - S m)%nat = 0%hz
b':= fpsshift b: fpscommring hz
f: natsummation0 m (λ x : nat, a x * b (S m - x)%nat) =
natsummation0 m (λ x : nat, a x * b' (m - x)%nat)
one: m < k + S k'
(a * b') m = 0%hz

(** ** Definition of p-adic integers *)

Section A.

Variable p : hz.
Variable is : isaprime p.

Definition commringofpadicints :=
  commringquot ( ringcarryequiv p ( isaprimetoneq0 is ) ).

Definition padicplus := @op1 commringofpadicints.

Definition padictimes := @op2 commringofpadicints.

(** * III. The apartness relation on p-adic integers *)

Definition padicapart0 :
  hrel ( fpscommring hz ) := fun a b =>
    ∃ n : nat, neq _ ( carry p ( isaprimetoneq0 is) a n )
                   ( carry p ( isaprimetoneq0 is) b n ).


p: hz
is: isaprime p
iscomprelrel (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
  padicapart0


p: hz
is: isaprime p
iscomprelrel (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
  padicapart0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
padicapart0 a b = padicapart0 a' b'

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
padicapart0 a b → padicapart0 a' b'
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
padicapart0 a' b' → padicapart0 a b

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
padicapart0 a b → padicapart0 a' b'
 
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
k: padicapart0 a b
padicapart0 a' b'

    
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
k: padicapart0 a b
(∑ n : nat,
 neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a n)
   (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b n))
→ padicapart0 a' b'

    
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
k: padicapart0 a b
u: ∑ n : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a n)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b n)
padicapart0 a' b'

    
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
k: padicapart0 a b
n: nat
u: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a n)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b n)
padicapart0 a' b'

    
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, a', b, b': fpscommring hz
i: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a a'
j: carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b b'
k: padicapart0 a b

p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) x): nat → hProp
isdec: isdecnatprop P

 apply natlthnsn.

is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) x): nat → hProp
isdec: isdecnatprop P
leexists:= leastelementprinciple n P isdec x: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
k: nat
k': P (S k)
k'': ∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m
i: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k)
P k

  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) x): nat → hProp
isdec: isdecnatprop P
leexists:= leastelementprinciple n P isdec x: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
k: nat
k': make_hProp
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
     (S k)
   != precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k))
  (isapropneg
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
        (S k) =
      precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +

        (S k)))

i: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k) =

j: precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k =
precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k
∅

  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)

  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)

leexists:= leastelementprinciple n P isdec x: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)

k': make_hProp
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
     (S k)
   != precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)

p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) x): nat → hProp
isdec: isdecnatprop P
leexists:= leastelementprinciple n P isdec x: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
k: nat
k': make_hProp
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
     (S k)
   != precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k))
  (isapropneg
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
        (S k) =
      precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k)))
k'': ∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m
i: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k)
j: precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k =
precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) +
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k) +
hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) +
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k) +
hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k)

      
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) x): nat → hProp
isdec: isdecnatprop P
leexists:= leastelementprinciple n P isdec x: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
k: nat
k': make_hProp
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
     (S k)
   != precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k))
  (isapropneg
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
        (S k) =
      precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k)))
k'': ∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m
i: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k)
j: precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k =
precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) +
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k) +
hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) +
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k) +
hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k)

      
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) x): nat → hProp
isdec: isdecnatprop P
leexists:= leastelementprinciple n P isdec x: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
k: nat
k': make_hProp
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
     (S k)
   != precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k))
  (isapropneg
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
        (S k) =
      precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k)))
k'': ∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m
i: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k)
j: precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k =
precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) +
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k) +
hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) +
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k) +
hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k)

      apply idpath.
Defined.


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) n)
padicapart0 b c

is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) n)
padicapart0 b c

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) n)
padicapart0 b c

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
padicapart0 b c

  apply ( padicapartandplusprecarryl a b c n x ).
Defined.

(** here used to be shown the lemmas [commringquotprandop1] and
    [commringquotprandop2] *)


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: fpscommring hz
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a +
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) (a + b)


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: fpscommring hz
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a +
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) (a + b)

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: fpscommring hz
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a +
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) (a + b)

  apply commringquotprandop1.
Defined.

is: isaprime p

setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a *

setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) (a * b)

is: isaprime p

setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b =

  apply commringquotprandop2.
Defined.


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
u: padicapart0 (a + b) (a + c)
padicapart0 b c

is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
u: padicapart0 (a + b) (a + c)
padicapart0 b c

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz

padicapart0 b c

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
u: padicapart0 (a + b) (a + c)
(∑ n : nat,
 neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a + b) n)
   (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a + c) n))
→ padicapart0 b c

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
u: padicapart0 (a + b) (a + c)
n: ∑ n : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a + b) n)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a + c) n)
padicapart0 b c

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p

   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k

  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a +
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) (S k) =

p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ x x' x'' : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart (padicplus x x') (padicplus x x'') → pr1 padicapart x' x'')
∏ a b c : commringofpadicints,
