p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ x x' x'' : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart (padicplus x x') (padicplus x x'') → pr1 padicapart x' x'')
∏ x x' x'' : fpscommring hz,
make_hProp
  (pr1 padicapart
     (padicplus
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x'))
     (padicplus
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x''))
   → pr1 padicapart
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x')
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x''))
  (int
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x')
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x''))

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ x x' x'' : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart (padicplus x x') (padicplus x x'') → pr1 padicapart x' x'')
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
make_hProp
  (pr1 padicapart
     (padicplus
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b))
     (padicplus
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c))
   → pr1 padicapart
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c))
  (int
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        a)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        b)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        c))

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ x x' x'' : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart (padicplus x x') (padicplus x x'') → pr1 padicapart x' x'')
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
pr1 padicapart
  (padicplus
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        a)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        b))
  (padicplus
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        a)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        c))
→ pr1 padicapart
    (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
       b)
    (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
       c)

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ x x' x'' : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart (padicplus x x') (padicplus x x'') → pr1 padicapart x' x'')
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
pr1 padicapart
  (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a +
   setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
  (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a +
   setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c)
→ pr1 padicapart
    (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
       b)
    (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
       c)

  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)

neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *

isdec: isdecnatprop P

k': make_hProp
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *

   != precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *

  (isapropneg

    apply idpath.

is: isaprime p

      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)

neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)

is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: neq hz

      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) x)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) x): nat → hProp
isdec: isdecnatprop P
leexists:= leastelementprinciple n P isdec x: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
k: nat
k': make_hProp
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
     (S k)
   != precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k))
  (isapropneg
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
        (S k) =
      precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) 
        (S k)))
k'': ∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m
IHk: P k
→ (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m) → padicapart0 b c
Q:= λ o : nat,
make_hProp
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o =
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c o)
  (isasethz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c o)): nat → hProp
isdec': isdecnatprop Q
l: ∏ m : nat, m ≤ S k → Q m
j: precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k =
precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k
f: natsummation0 (S k)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x0 *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k - x0)%nat) =
natsummation0 (S k)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x0 *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S k - x0)%nat)
natsummation0 (S k)
  (λ x : nat,
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S k - x)%nat) +
hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) k) =
natsummation0 (S k)
  (λ x : nat,

hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)

      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) k)

      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S n - x)%nat) +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)) =
hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (natsummation0 (S n)
     (λ x : nat,
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S n - x)%nat) +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n))

      
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
u: padicapart0 (a * b) (a * c)
n: nat
n': make_hProp
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * b) (S n)
   != carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * c) (S n))
  (isapropneg
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * b) (S n) =
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * c) (S n)))
Q:= λ o : nat,
make_hProp
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o =
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c o)
  (isasethz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c o)): nat → hProp
isdec': isdecnatprop Q
l: ∏ m : nat, m ≤ S n → Q m
j: precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) n =
precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n
f: natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x0 *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S n - x0)%nat) =
natsummation0 (S n)
  (λ x0 : nat,
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x0 *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S n - x0)%nat)
hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (natsummation0 (S n)
     (λ x0 : nat,
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x0 *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S n - x0)%nat) +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n)) =
hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (natsummation0 (S n)
     (λ x : nat,
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c (S n - x)%nat) +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c) n))

      apply idpath.

a, b, c: fpscommring hz
u: padicapart0 (a * b) (a * c)
n: nat
n': neq hz
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * b) (S n))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * c) (S n))
Q:= λ o : nat,
make_hProp
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o =
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c o)
  (isasethz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c o)): nat → hProp
isdec': isdecnatprop Q
r: ∃ m : nat, m ≤ S n × ¬ Q m
padicapart0 b c

  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) c k)

→ pr1 padicapart x' x'')
∏ x x' x'' : fpscommring hz,
make_hProp
  (pr1 padicapart
     (padictimes
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x'))
     (padictimes
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x''))
   → pr1 padicapart
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x')
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x''))
  (int
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x')
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x''))

int: ∏ x x' x'' : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart (padictimes x x') (padictimes x x'')
→ pr1 padicapart x' x'')
a, b, c: fpscommring hz
make_hProp
  (pr1 padicapart
     (padictimes
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b))
     (padictimes
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
        (setquotpr
           (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c))
   → pr1 padicapart
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c))
  (int
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        a)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        b)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        c))

→ pr1 padicapart x' x'')

pr1 padicapart
  (padictimes
     (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
     (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b))
  (padictimes

     (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c))

→ pr1 padicapart x' x'')

  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a *
   setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a *
   setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c)

    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) c)

     (a * b))

     (a * c))

(** * IV. The apartness domain of p-adic integers and the Heyting field of p-adic numbers *)


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: ∏ m : nat,
m < n → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
∏ m : nat,
m < n
→ precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
       (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) m = 0%hz

x: ∏ m : nat,

m < n
→ precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
       (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) m = 0%hz

y: m < n

  (fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) m = 0%hz

  (fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) 0 = 0%hz

is: isaprime p

n: nat
x: ∏ m : nat,
m < n → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz

y: S m < n
IHm: m < n
→ precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
(fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
(carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) m = 0%hz

  (fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) (S m) = 0%hz

  (fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) 0 = 0%hz

  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 0%nat = 0%hz

  (λ x : nat,

   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (0 - x)%nat) = 0%hz

p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: fpscommring hz
n: nat
x: ∏ m : nat,
m < n → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
m: nat
y: S m < n
IHm: m < n
→ precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
(fpstimes hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)

(** here used to be shown the lemmas [hzfpstimesnonzero] and
    [hzfpstimeswhenzero], now before part III *)


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: fpscommring hz
k, k': nat
x: ∏ m : nat,
m < k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
x': ∏ m : nat,
m < k' → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
∏ m : nat,
m < k + k'

x: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * b) = 0

t0: hzdiv p a
k: hz
k': hzdiv0 p a k
Q: hProp
j: (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a = 0)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b = 0) → Q
Q

k: hz
k': hzdiv0 p b k
Q: hProp
j: (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a = 0)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b = 0) → Q
hzlth 0 p

hzgth p 0%hz

Defined.

Definition padiczero := @ringunel1 commringofpadicints.

Definition padicone := @ringunel2 commringofpadicints.


p: hz
is: isaprime p
padiczero =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0


p: hz
is: isaprime p
padiczero =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
padiczero =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0

  apply idpath.
Defined.


p: hz
is: isaprime p
padicone =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 1


p: hz
is: isaprime p
padicone =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 1

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
padicone =
setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 1

  apply idpath.
Defined.


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
a # 0 → b # 0 → a * b # 0


p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
a # 0 → b # 0 → a * b # 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
  (pr1 padicapart a padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart b padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a # 0 → b # 0 → a * b # 0

is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
  (pr1 padicapart a padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart b padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
a0, b0: commringofpadicints
isaprop
  (pr1 padicapart a0 padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart b0 padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a0 b0) padiczero)

is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
a0, b0: commringofpadicints
pr1 padicapart a0 padiczero
→ isofhlevel 1
    (pr1 padicapart b0 padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a0 b0) padiczero)

is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
a0, b0: commringofpadicints
t: pr1 padicapart a0 padiczero
isofhlevel 1
  (pr1 padicapart b0 padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a0 b0) padiczero)

a, b: acommringofpadicints
a0, b0: commringofpadicints

pr1 padicapart b0 padiczero

    (pr1 padicapart (padictimes a0 b0) padiczero)

is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
a0, b0: commringofpadicints
t: pr1 padicapart a0 padiczero
t0: pr1 padicapart b0 padiczero
isofhlevel 1
  (pr1 padicapart (padictimes a0 b0) padiczero)

    apply ( pr1 padicapart ).
  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
a, b: acommringofpadicints
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a # 0 → b # 0 → a * b # 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
∏ a b : acommringofpadicints,
a # 0 → b # 0 → a * b # 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
∏ x x' : fpscommring hz,
make_hProp
  (pr1 padicapart
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x) padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) x')
       padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart
         (padictimes
            (setquotpr
               (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
               x)
            (setquotpr
               (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
               x')) padiczero)
  (int
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        x'))

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
make_hProp
  (pr1 padicapart
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        a) padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart
       (setquotpr
          (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
       padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart
         (padictimes
            (setquotpr
               (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
               a)
            (setquotpr
               (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
               b)) padiczero)
  (int
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        a)
     (setquotpr (ringcarryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
        b))

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
pr1 padicapart
  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
  padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart
    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
    padiczero
  → pr1 padicapart
      (padictimes
         (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
            a)
         (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
            b)) padiczero

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
pr1 padicapart
  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
  padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart
    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
    padiczero
  → pr1 padicapart
      (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a *
       setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
      padiczero

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
pr1 padicapart
  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0)
→ pr1 padicapart
    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0)
  → pr1 padicapart
      (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a *
       setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
      (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0)

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
pr1 padicapart
  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) a)
  (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0)
→ pr1 padicapart
    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) b)
    (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0)
  → pr1 padicapart
      (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is))
         (a * b))
      (setquotpr (carryequiv p (isaprimetoneq0 is)) 0)

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
padicapart0 a 0
→ padicapart0 b 0 → padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
(∑ n : nat,
 neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a n)
   (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 n))
→ padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: ∑ n : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a n)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 n)
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 i0)
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 i0)
(∑ n : nat,
 neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b n)
   (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 n))
→ padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz

j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 i0)
j0: ∑ n : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b n)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 n)
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 i0)
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 j0)
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz

j: padicapart0 b 0

j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) (0 j0)

j0: nat

j0: nat

is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0

i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

  
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdecnatprop P
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
padicapart0 (a * b) 0

isdec1: isdecnatprop P

r: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m != 0%hz

i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
m: nat
m0: m < k
left0: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
 assumption.

is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

j0: nat

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)

m0: m < k
right0: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m != 0%hz
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz

p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

k': P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
neq hz
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * b) (k + o)%nat)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 (k + o)%nat)

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

k': P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
o: nat

is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
  (pr1 padicapart a padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart b padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0

j0: nat

isdec2: isdecnatprop P'

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

k': P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)

m < k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz

  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a * b) (k + o)%nat)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0 (k + o)%nat)

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a k) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
 apply o'.

→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

k': P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)

m < k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,

  three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)

is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
  (pr1 padicapart a padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart b padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz

neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
neq hz
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
     (S k + o)%nat) 0%hz

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

  three 0 (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,

→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o': P' 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three 0 (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (0 + 0)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b 0%nat
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (a 0%nat * b 0%nat) = 0%hz
t: (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (a 0%nat) =
 0)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (b 0%nat) =
   0)

j0: nat

P':= λ x : nat,

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': make_hProp
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat != 0)
  (isapropneg
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat = 0))
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → ¬ make_hProp
         (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m != 0)
         (isapropneg
            (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0)))

m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz

× (∏ m : nat,

  three 0 (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)

carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *

isdec2: isdecnatprop P'

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o': make_hProp
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b 0%nat != 0)
  (isapropneg
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b 0%nat = 0))
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → ¬ make_hProp
         (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m != 0)
         (isapropneg
            (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0)))
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three 0 (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (0 + 0)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b 0%nat
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (a 0%nat * b 0%nat) = 0%hz
t1: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) (b 0%nat) =
0
hfalse

j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz

  0%hz

   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)

  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (0 + S o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
neq hz
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) (0 + S o)%nat)
  0%hz

neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o) +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) o)) = 0%hz
∅

is: isaprime p

→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

P':= λ x : nat,

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)

two: ∏ m : nat,

  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o) +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (fpstimes hz
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) o)) =
0%hz
∅

int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0%hz
hfalse
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
  (pr1 padicapart a padiczero
   → pr1 padicapart b padiczero
     → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0%hz
X: hfalse
∅

is: isaprime p

isaprop

→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S o

  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0%hz

p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0
hfalse

          
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < 0
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0
(hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
   (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat) = 0)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)) = 0)
→ hfalse

j0: nat

P':= λ x : nat,

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *

p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp

isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

two: ∏ m : nat,

            (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0)))

m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,

→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o) != 0)
  (isapropneg
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o) = 0))
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S o
   → ¬ make_hProp
         (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m != 0)
         (isapropneg
            (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0)))

int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,

(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz

P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp

isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k': P 0%nat × (∏ m : nat, m < 0 → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' (S o) × (∏ m : nat, m < S o → ¬ P' m)

m < 0 → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < S o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz

  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,

  0%hz

   m < S o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a) 0
  three (S o) (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S o) =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o)

  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a 0%nat *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b (S o) +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (fpstimes hz
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)) o)) =
0%hz

p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
neq hz
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) (S k + o)%nat)
  0%hz

is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop

→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0

i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat = 0%hz
∅

o: nat

      carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat

         carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)

a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is) 0%hz) =
0%hz
∅
 
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o + 0%hz) = 0%hz
∅

o: nat

  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)

p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
hfalse

        
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
(hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
   (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0) → hfalse

        
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
s: (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
   (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0)
⨿ (hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0)

is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)

j: padicapart0 b 0

j0: nat

neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp

le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)

k': make_hProp
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) != 0)
  (isapropneg
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) = 0))
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → ¬ make_hProp
         (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m != 0)
         (isapropneg
            (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0)))

o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz

   m < o

f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0

i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
r: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
hfalse
 
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → ¬ neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m) 0)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
r: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
hfalse
 
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': make_hProp (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o != 0)
  (isapropneg
     (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o = 0))
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → ¬ make_hProp
         (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m != 0)
         (isapropneg
            (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0)))
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz
aux:= hzremaindermodprimeandtimes
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k)) = 0
∨ hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
    (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
r: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0
hfalse

p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0

j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp

isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) = 0%hz

∅

      assumption.
    
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (fpstimes hz
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b))
        (k + o))) = 0%hz
∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
 apply one.
    
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (fpstimes hz
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b))
        (k + o))) = 0%hz
∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
 apply two.
    
p: hz
is: isaprime p
int: ∏ a b : commringofpadicints,
isaprop
(pr1 padicapart a padiczero
→ pr1 padicapart b padiczero → pr1 padicapart (padictimes a b) padiczero)
a, b: fpscommring hz
i: padicapart0 a 0
j: padicapart0 b 0
i0: nat
i1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a i0) 0%hz
j0: nat
j1: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b j0) 0%hz
P:= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a x) 0: nat → hProp
P':= λ x : nat,
neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b x) 0: nat → hProp
isdec1: isdecnatprop P
isdec2: isdecnatprop P'
le1:= leastelementprinciple i0 P isdec1 i1: ∃ k : nat, P k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P m)
le2:= leastelementprinciple j0 P' isdec2 j1: ∃ k : nat, P' k × (∏ m : nat, m < k → ¬ P' m)
k: nat
k': P (S k) × (∏ m : nat, m < S k → ¬ P m)
o: nat
o': P' o × (∏ m : nat, m < o → ¬ P' m)
one: ∏ m : nat,
m < S k → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz
two: ∏ m : nat,
m < o → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz
three: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k))
  0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < S k
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a m = 0%hz)
four: neq hz (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o) 0%hz
× (∏ m : nat,
   m < o
   → carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b m = 0%hz)
f:= hzfpstimesnonzero (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
  (S k) three o (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b)
  four: (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a *
 carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b) 
  (S k + o)%nat =
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o
v: hzremaindermod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
  (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a (S k) *
   carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b o +
   hzquotientmod p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
     (precarry p (isaprimetoneq0 is)
        (fpstimes hz
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) a)
           (carry p (isaprimetoneq0 is) b))
        (k + o))) = 0%hz
k + o < S k + o
 apply natlthnsn.
Defined.

    apply isnonzerorighz.

∏ a b : acommringofpadicints,
a # 0 → b # 0 → a * b # 0
 apply padicintsareintdom.
Defined.

Definition padics : afld := afldfrac padicintegers.
